overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring an abandoned post-apocalyptic village with overgrown vegetation and derelict military vehicles. The player approaches and interacts with several armed NPCs near a fortified brick building under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned village approach with scattered derelict vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy path toward the abandoned village camp

notable_agents.action: gas-masked guard standing near the path ahead, holding a rifle

entered.detail: large two-story brick building with circular window and broken windows
tall metal lattice tower behind the main building
overhead electrical wires crossing the sky
destroyed vehicle wreckage blocking part of the path
weathered wooden plank fence lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a muddy dirt path into an abandoned village under an overcast sky. To the left stands a large brick building with a watchtower, while derelict vehicles and a red combine harvester sit abandoned along the path. A gas-masked NPC stands guard in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy checkpoint area with burning barrel

events.description: camera tilts down to show character's feet standing in a muddy puddle with floating leaves
initiating dialogue with the gas-masked NPC named Richter

agents.ego_description: stopping to look down at the puddle, then approaching and talking to the gas-masked guard

notable_agents.action: Richter wearing a gas mask and hood, holding a rifle, engaging in conversation

entered.detail: large muddy puddle with floating leaves reflecting the sky
metal barrel with flames providing heat and light

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down to reveal the player's feet standing in a muddy puddle, then rises to face Richter, a gas-masked NPC holding a rifle. A burning barrel provides warmth nearby as the player initiates dialogue. The watchtower and power lines recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path between wooden houses and military vehicles

events.description: initiating dialogue with the bearded NPC named Korshunov

agents.ego_description: moving past the burning barrel to approach the bearded guard standing near a wooden house

notable_agents.action: Korshunov with a beard and tactical vest, holding a shotgun, engaging in conversation

entered.detail: single-story wooden cabin with weathered planks
armored personnel carrier parked near the trees

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the burning barrel toward Korshunov, a bearded NPC with a shotgun standing near a wooden house. An abandoned military APC sits in the background among the trees as the player stops to talk.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified military outpost with sandbag emplacements and large truck

events.description: approaching and initiating dialogue with the bald NPC named Leshiy at the sandbag wall

agents.ego_description: ascending the steps toward the main building, circling the large military truck, and approaching the sandbag emplacement

notable_agents.action: Leshiy, a bald guard in tactical gear, standing watch at the sandbag wall

entered.detail: large green 6x6 military truck with canvas cover parked beside the building
defensive wall made of stacked sandbags
fortified position with sandbags and wooden supports
low brick wall with concrete pillars enclosing the area
stone steps leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player ascends concrete steps toward the main brick building, passing a large Ural military truck parked alongside. Moving around the truck, the player approaches Leshiy, a bald guard standing at a sandbag bunker near a brick perimeter wall, and initiates conversation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desolate, muddy village that transitions from an open path of derelict machinery to the fortified perimeter of a brick stronghold. It begins by moving along a dirt road under an overcast sky, passing a red combine harvester and abandoned vehicles toward a distant guard. As the camera tilts down to a muddy puddle before rising to face a gas-masked NPC, the focus shifts to a close encounter beside a burning barrel while the watchtower recedes into the background. The movement then continues past the fire toward a bearded man with a shotgun near a wooden house and a military APC, before turning toward a set of concrete steps. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs and maneuvers around a large Ural military truck to reach a bald guard stationed at a sandbag bunker against a brick wall.
